title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PRESCRIPTIVE PERIOD FOR VIOLATIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3019, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ГўВҖВңANTI-GRAFT AND CORRUPT PRACTICES ACTГўВҖВҷ, FROM FIFTEEN (15) YEARS TO TWENTY (20) YEARS, AMENDING SECTION II THEREOF

chunks.text:
S. No. 2422 H. No. 4146 ; Manila Bulletin and Philippine Star (August 01, 2016); 112 OG No. 34, 5452 (August 22, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10910, July 21, 2016 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE PRESCRIPTIVE PERIOD FOR VIOLATIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3019, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ГўВҖВңANTI-GRAFT AND CORRUPT PRACTICES ACTГўВҖВҷ, FROM FIFTEEN (15) YEARS TO TWENTY (20) YEARS, AMENDING SECTION II THEREOF

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section 11 of Republic Act No. 3019, as amended, otherwise known as the ГўВҖВңAnti-Graft and Corrupt Practices ActГўВҖВқ, is hereby further amended to read as follows:

ГўВҖВңSEC. 11. Prescription of Offenses. ГўВҖВ“ All offenses punishable under this Act shall prescribe in twenty years.ГўВҖВқ

SEC. 2.

Separability Clause.

ГўВҖВ“ Should any provision of this Act be declared invalid, the remaining provisions shall continue to be valid and subsisting.

SEC. 3.

Repealing Clause.

ГўВҖВ“ All laws, executive orders, or administrative orders, rules and regulations or parts thereof, which are inconsistent with this Act are hereby amended, repealed or modified accordingly.

SEC. 4.

Effectivity.

ГўВҖВ“ This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in at least two (2) newspapers of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

(Sgd.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

Senate Bill No. 2422, which was approved by the Senate on May 25, 2015, was adopted as an amendment to House Bill No. 4146 by the House of Representatives on May 23, 2016.

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

Approved:

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines

Lapsed into law on

JUL 21 2016

Without the signature of the President

In accordance with Article VI, Section

27 (1) of the Constitution
